zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Houghton於1306年出生在英國爾莫利頓時，她的父親Richard de Houghton28歲，母親Lady Sybil de Lea23歲。她於大約1320年與Richard Stanhope I在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Houghton于1306年出生在英国爾莫利頓时，她的父亲Richard de Houghton28岁，母亲Lady Sybil de Lea23岁。她于大约1320年与Richard Stanhope I在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Houghton was born in 1306, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, her father, Richard de Houghton, was 28 and her mother, Lady Sybil de Lea, was 23. She married Richard Stanhope I about 1320, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1360, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Houghton est née en 1306, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Houghton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Sybil de Lea, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Stanhope I environ 1320, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Houghton 1306 in Mollington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Houghton 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Sybil de Lea 23. Sie hat um 1320 in Nottinghamshire, England Richard Stanhope I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Houghton è nata il nel 1306 nel Mollington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Houghton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Sybil de Lea, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard Stanhope I circa 1320, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Houghtonが1306年にイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで生まれた時，父Richard de Houghtonは28歳，母Lady Sybil de Leaは23歳であった。約1320年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでRichard Stanhope Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Houghton(이)가 1306년 영국 체실르 모링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Houghton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sybil de Lea(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Richard Stanhope I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Houghton nasceu em 1306, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Houghton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sybil de Lea, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Stanhope I aproximadamente 1320, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Houghton родилась в 1306 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Houghton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sybil de Lea, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Stanhope I около 1320 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Houghton nació en 1306, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Houghton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Sybil de Lea, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Stanhope I aproximadamente 1320, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
